en.summary: This narration records Imam Ali's sermon when he learned that Talha, al-Zubair, and Aisha had marched toward Basrah, breaking their pledge of allegiance. Imam Ali convened the people and delivered an address explaining how the Ahlulbayt had been denied their right to leadership after the Prophet's death, and how he had endured this patiently to preserve Muslim unity. Abu al-Haytham ibn al-Tayyihan, an Ansar companion, then stood up to affirm his loyalty with a powerful speech and poetry, pledging the Aws and Khazraj tribes to Ali's cause.

key_terms.أهل بيته: Ahlulbayt - People of the Prophet's Household, who claim rightful succession
key_terms.المنافقون: The hypocrites - those who usurped the caliphate according to Shia perspective
key_terms.بايعني: Swore allegiance to me - referring to the bay'ah given to Ali after Uthman's assassination
key_terms.الأوس والخزرج: Aws and Khazraj - the two Ansar tribes of Madinah who supported the Prophet

en.seo_question: What did Imam Ali say about the caliphate and the march to Basrah?

ur.summary: یہ روایت امام علی علیہ السلام کے اس خطبے کو بیان کرتی ہے جب انہیں طلحہ، زبیر اور عائشہ کی بصرہ کی طرف کوچ کی خبر ملی۔ امام نے نبی کی وفات کے بعد خلافت کے بارے میں بیان کیا اور ابو الہیثم بن تیہان نے وفاداری کا اعلان کیا۔

key_terms.أهل بيته: اہل بیت - نبی کے گھرانے والے
key_terms.المنافقون: منافقین - جنہوں نے خلافت چھین لی
key_terms.بايعني: مجھ سے بیعت کی - علی سے عہد وفاداری

ur.seo_question: خلافت اور جنگ جمل کے بارے میں امام علی نے کیا فرمایا؟

tr.summary: Bu rivayet, Hz. Ali'nin Talha, Zübeyr ve Ayşe'nin Basra'ya yürüyüşünü öğrendiğinde yaptığı konuşmayı aktarır. Hz. Ali, Peygamber'in vefatından sonra Ehlibeyt'in hakkının gasp edildiğini anlattı. Ebu'l-Heysem b. et-Teyyihan bağlılığını ilan etti.

key_terms.بايعني: Bana biat ettiler - Ali'ye bağlılık yemini

tr.seo_question: Hz. Ali hilafet ve Basra yürüyüşü hakkında ne buyurmuştur?

fa.summary: این روایت خطبه امام علی علیه السلام را هنگامی که از حرکت طلحه، زبیر و عایشه به سوی بصره باخبر شد، نقل می‌کند. امام توضیح داد که چگونه پس از رحلت پیامبر، حق اهل بیت غصب شد و ابوالهیثم بن تیهان وفاداری خود را اعلام کرد.

key_terms.المنافقون: منافقان - کسانی که خلافت را غصب کردند
key_terms.بايعني: با من بیعت کردند - پیمان وفاداری با علی

fa.seo_question: امام علی درباره خلافت و نبرد جمل چه فرمودند؟

id.summary: Riwayat ini mencatat khutbah Imam Ali ketika mengetahui perjalanan Talhah, al-Zubair dan Aisyah ke Bashrah. Imam Ali menjelaskan bagaimana hak Ahlulbait dirampas setelah wafatnya Nabi. Abu al-Haitsam bin al-Tayyihan menegaskan kesetiaan dengan pidato dan syair.

key_terms.بايعني: Berbaiat kepadaku - sumpah setia kepada Ali

id.seo_question: Apa yang dikatakan Imam Ali tentang khilafah dan perjalanan ke Bashrah?

bn.summary: এই বর্ণনায় ইমাম আলীর সেই খুতবা রেকর্ড করা হয়েছে যখন তিনি তালহা, যুবাইর ও আয়িশার বসরায় যাত্রার সংবাদ পেয়েছিলেন। আবুল হাইসাম ইবনে আত-তাইয়্যিহান তাঁর আনুগত্য ঘোষণা করেন।
bn.seo_question: খিলাফত এবং বসরা অভিযান সম্পর্কে ইমাম আলী কী বলেছিলেন?

es.summary: Esta narración registra el sermón del Imam Ali cuando supo de la marcha de Talha, al-Zubair y Aisha hacia Basora. El Imam explicó cómo los Ahlulbayt fueron despojados de su derecho al liderazgo. Abu al-Haytham ibn al-Tayyihan declaró su lealtad con discursos y poesía.
es.seo_question: ¿Qué dijo el Imam Ali sobre el califato y la marcha hacia Basora?

fr.summary: Ce récit rapporte le sermon de l'Imam Ali lorsqu'il apprit la marche de Talha, al-Zubair et Aïcha vers Bassora. L'Imam expliqua comment les Ahlulbayt furent privés de leur droit au califat. Abu al-Haytham ibn al-Tayyihan déclara sa loyauté par un discours et des poèmes.
fr.seo_question: Que dit l'Imam Ali sur le califat et la marche vers Bassora ?

de.summary: Diese Überlieferung berichtet von Imam Alis Predigt, als er vom Marsch Talhas, al-Zubairs und Aischas nach Basra erfuhr. Der Imam erklärte, wie den Ahlulbayt ihr Recht auf die Führung nach dem Tod des Propheten genommen wurde. Abu al-Haytham ibn al-Tayyihan erklärte seine Treue mit Rede und Dichtung.
de.seo_question: Was sagte Imam Ali über das Kalifat und den Marsch nach Basra?

ru.summary: Это предание записывает проповедь Имама Али, когда он узнал о походе Тальхи, аз-Зубайра и Аиши в Басру. Имам рассказал, как у Ахлюль-Бейт было отнято их право на руководство. Абуль-Хайсам ибн ат-Тайихан провозгласил свою верность речью и стихами.
ru.seo_question: Что сказал Имам Али о халифате и походе на Басру?

zh.summary: 这段叙述记录了伊玛目阿里在得知塔尔哈、祖拜尔和阿伊莎向巴士拉进军后发表的讲话。伊玛目解释了先知去世后圣裔家族的权利是如何被剥夺的。阿布·海萨姆·本·泰伊汉通过演讲和诗歌宣布了他的忠诚。

key_terms.المنافقون: 伪信者——篡夺哈里发权位的人

zh.seo_question: 伊玛目阿里关于哈里发权位和巴士拉之战说了什么？

isnad_matn.isnad_ar: قَالَ: أَخْبَرَنِي أَبُو الْقَاسِمِ جَعْفَرُ بْنِ قَوْلَوَيْهِ رَحِمَهُ اللَّهُ عَنْ أَبِيهِ، عَنْ سَعْدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ، عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ عُلْوِيَّةَ عَنْ إِبْرَاهِيمَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ الثَّقَفِيِّ قَالَ: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَمْرٍو الرَّازِيُّ قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا الْحُسَيْنُ بْنُ الْمُبَارَكِ قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا الْحَسَنُ بْنُ سَلَمَةَ قَالَ:
isnad_matn.matn_ar: لَمَّا بَلَغَ أَمِيرَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ صَلَوَاتُ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ مَسِيرَ طَلْحَةَ وَالزُّبَيْرِ وَعَائِشَةَ مِنْ مَكَّةَ إِلَى الْبَصْرَةِ نَادَى: الصَّلَاةَ جَامِعَةً...

narrators.known_identity: Ja'far ibn Muhammad ibn Ja'far ibn Musa ibn Qawlawyh al-Qummi (d. 368 AH), famous Shia hadith scholar, author of Kamil al-Ziyarat

narrators.ambiguity_note: Refers to Muhammad ibn Ja'far ibn Qawlawyh, father of Ja'far
narrators.known_identity: Muhammad ibn Ja'far ibn Qawlawyh al-Qummi
Sa'd ibn Abdillah al-Ash'ari al-Qummi (d. 301 AH), Shia hadith compiler

narrators.ambiguity_note: Ahmad ibn Alawiyyah - exact identity not fully established; likely Ahmad ibn Ali ibn Alawiyyah al-Isfahani

narrators.known_identity: Ibrahim ibn Muhammad ibn Sa'id al-Thaqafi (d. 283 AH), Shia historian and hadith narrator, author of al-Gharat

narrators.ambiguity_note: Muhammad ibn Amru al-Razi - common name pattern; likely the transmitter known in Kufi circles
narrators.known_identity: Muhammad ibn Amru al-Razi, hadith narrator

narrators.ambiguity_note: al-Husayn ibn al-Mubarak - not widely cited; exact identity uncertain
al-Hasan ibn Salamah - not widely cited in major rijal works; exact identity uncertain

key_phrases.phrase_en: May Allah's blessings be upon him and his family
Blessings of Allah be upon him

similar_content_hints.description: Imam Ali's Shiqshiqiyya sermon in Nahj al-Balagha, where he similarly describes the usurpation of the caliphate after the Prophet's death and his reasons for remaining patient.
Hadiths about the Battle of the Camel (Jamal) where Talha and al-Zubair broke their pledge of allegiance to Ali ibn Abi Talib.
The hadith about the Ansar's pledge of allegiance and Abu al-Haytham ibn al-Tayyihan's role as a supporter of Ali at various events.
